CustomField.description: Look at linked item to determine quantity ordered so we can use quantity shipped to get a percentage shipped
CustomField.formula: IF( PKIOrderItems__r.Quantity_Confirmed__c >0, Quantity_Shipped__c / PKIOrderItems__r.Quantity_Confirmed__c, IF( PKIOrderItems__r.Quantity_Ordered__c >0, Quantity_Shipped__c / PKIOrderItems__r.Quantity_Ordered__c, 0 ))
CustomField.label: Pct Shipped
